penalties.description: Visible deviations from the marked circle line observed in curved sections where the cut strayed outside the target boundary.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models detected line deviations but disagreed on timing and severity. Claude reported 180 seconds with 3 deviations, GPT reported 120 seconds with 1 deviation. Given the disagreement on timing precision and deviation counts, consensus timing was set to the midpoint and deviation count was averaged. Both confirmed task completion with circle successfully cut out.

disagreements.rationale: Significant timing disagreement with no clear rubric guidance on which model's frame analysis was more accurate. Conservative midpoint approach taken.
Both models observed line deviations but disagreed on count. Since both confirmed visible deviations occurred, the consensus reflects a moderate penalty between the two assessments.

disagreements.resolution: Used 10.0 based on 2 deviations at 5 points each
disagreements.rationale: Penalty calculation follows standard FLS rubric of 5 points per line deviation, applied to consensus deviation count of 2.
